summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Digital Twin Platform agent pairing and telemetry flow. All 12 tests passed successfully. The critical /api/agent/device/{device_id}/status endpoint that was returning 404 on the old deployment now works correctly on the current deployment (safe-import-pro.preview.emergentagent.com).
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/signup - creates organization and user account
POST /api/auth/login - authenticates and returns access/refresh tokens
POST /api/enrollment/codes - creates pairing code in DT-XXXX-XXXX format
POST /api/agent/pair - exchanges pairing code for device_id, access_token, refresh_token, ws_url, api_url, and policy config
GET /api/agent/device/{device_id}/status - returns HTTP 200 with hostname/online/last_seen/status for paired device (CRITICAL FIX - was 404 on old deployment)
GET /api/agent/device/{unknown_id}/status - returns HTTP 404 with 'Device not paired yet' detail for unknown devices
WebSocket /api/ws/agent?token=<jwt> - authenticates device via JWT, marks is_online=true, returns hello frame with device_id and server_time
WebSocket metrics frame - persists telemetry row, updates devices.latest_metrics, computes health_score and risk_level
WebSocket inventory frame - promotes cpu_model/cpu_cores/motherboard/bios_version/ram_gb/disk_gb to device top-level fields
GET /api/devices/{device_id} - returns device with populated latest_metrics, inventory fields, and computed health_score
GET /api/devices - returns paginated list including the paired device
GET /api/devices/summary - returns fleet statistics (total, online, offline, with_agent, health counts)
